body:
This long overdue PR nukes `restore_from_checkpoint` and all its tests.

We've decided to support "picking up" a simulation from a checkpoint instead via `run!(simulation, pickup=true)`.

The reason is that we can only restore a limited subset of models that don't utilize user-defined functions. "Restoring" a model from a checkpoint is an error-prone processes, and supporting `restore_from_checkpoint` has proven difficult.

Picking up via `run!(simulation, pickup=true)` has the downside of requiring the original run script to restart a simulation, but the advantage of simplicity.

I've also updated the checkpointer documentation to describe `run!(simulation, pickup=true)`.
title: Nuke `restore_from_checkpoint`

body:
This PR change the order of pages in the Docs/Numerical Implementation section. It starts with "Finite volume method" and "Spatial operators" and then goes on with everything else.

Also fixes some loose ends in formatting. ;)
title: Change order in Docs/Numerical Implementations
